positive: A whimsical celestial forest scene featuring glowing mythological deer grazing among stylized bioluminescent flora. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, utilizing strong, graphic silhouettes against a deep twilight background. Style: Neo-vintage scientific illustration meets psychedelic Art Nouveau, emphasizing clean linework, high contrast, and vibrant magical colors (deep sapphire, emerald green, and gold accents). The imagery must be perfect for screen printing, with crisp outlines and flat areas of intense color. Highly detailed, majestic, ethereal mood.
